creator: Alexander Terp
description:
Sorting by a key function

  To sort stories by points, I had to build a list of lists with points as the first element so sort() would use it as the sort key. A sort(items, key=fn(x) x["points"]) or sort_by would be much more ergonomic.
  This is a common enough pattern that the workaround felt clunky.
title: function for sorting by keys
